member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetCharacterUnderwaterHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetCharacterUnderwaterHelper for sending a SetCharacterUnderwater
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetCharacterUnderwater
to.
member.remarks: Sets viscosity applied to damping limbs.
